announcements.announcement: If you need any machining, the NASA Machine Shop is open and is located outside the northeast passage. Exit pits under Section 33, turn left out the rollup door
If you lost your airpods they are at lost and found
If you have things set up outside, particularly canopies, please go check on them. The wind has picked up and is blowing things away.
Playing at Learning needs volunteers for Saturday. We need FRC Ambassadors for pit tours and volunteers for the FLL Explore Festival. Check at Pit Admin.
